title: AI Search Optimization (AI Visibility)
html:
The category Yahir has staked Rankett in: optimizing how brands appear inside AI answer engines — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, Google AI Overviews — as the post-SEO equivalent of search visibility. The tagline he's settled on is "prompts are the new keywords."

The thesis is older than the name. The 2022 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream (written weeks after ChatGPT's public launch) already contains the precursor line "Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have" alongside ChatGPT product wedges. The same note's "seek nonobvious things" filter is the methodological prerequisite — pick a category nobody has named yet. By April 2025 (2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 38 pm 56e50e24) the architectural shape is showing up by analogy in his coursework: the biometrics survey's negative recognition concept (system narrows from millions to hundreds, human closes the loop) maps onto the AI-narrows-then-agency-closes pattern Rankett later builds.

The category gets clearly named in mid-January 2026 (2026 01 13 rankett com). Yahir writes "ok we have been working on a general AI visibility space for a few month now and have done a whole lot" and explicitly asks himself "Are there people out there rn that are truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul?" — a sign he's tracking the meta of who else is staking the claim. That note also pins the GTM tooling: share of voice as the central score, exportable white labeled reports, "trigger legal terms and conditions before they get a client."

The full GTM articulation comes a week earlier in 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide — Rankett is a done-for-you white-label ai visibility engine for marketing/SEO agencies, $998/seat/month from agency to Rankett, agency charges client $3K–$6K/mo. Standardized fulfillment includes schema markup for AI, llms.txt implementation, directory management across 50+ sites, weekly-then-monthly reporting, auto-refresh analyses every 10 days. The pooled data network effect is the moat — every new agency benefits from accumulated cross-network results.

This concept is the direct heir to disruption in Yahir's thinking lineage: a category most of the SEO world hadn't named yet, with a clear post-platform story (Google → AI answer engines), a measurable score (share of voice), and a concrete GTM (whitelabel through agencies with 5+ existing clients).

Source summaries

  • 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream — antecedent thesis ("asking the right question")
  • 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 38 pm 56e50e24 — analogous architecture (negative recognition)
  • 2026 01 13 rankett com — explicit naming + share-of-voice scoring
  • 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide — full GTM articulation
  • first batch 2026 04 26 — meta-tracking the arc

Connections

  • rankett — the vehicle
  • ai visibility engine — the product
  • whitelabel strategy — the GTM
  • share of voice — the central score
  • schema markup for ai / llm txt — the optimization tactics
  • pooled data network effect — the moat
  • chatgpt / anthropic claude / gemini / perplexity / grok / deepseek / google ai overviews — the channels
  • disruption / nonobvious / asking the right question — the thinking lineage
